issues.issue: Description omits loading state, error state, retry behavior, the full-list link, and link-click callback. It only mentions version display and story association.
issues.suggestion: Dialog displaying a list of ChangelogItem versions with optional full-list link. Supports loading and error states with retry, and provides callbacks for story clicks and link clicks.

issues.issue: Description is too vague to be useful. It does not mention the key props (title, message, apply/cancel button text and handlers) or that it composes Dialog + Dialog.Footer and inherits all DialogProps except children.
issues.suggestion: Utility dialog composed from Dialog and Dialog.Footer. Accepts title, message, apply/cancel button text and click handlers. Inherits all DialogProps except children.

issues.issue: Description omits the 1-second display delay, the manageCookies prop that forces the manage view, and does not clarify that modes map to distinct sub-components (ConsentPopup, ConsentNotification, SimpleConsent).
issues.suggestion: Cookie consent banner shown after a 1-second delay when consent is not yet defined. Renders one of three sub-components (ConsentPopup, ConsentNotification, or SimpleConsent) based on consentManager.mode. The manageCookies prop forces the manage view regardless of mode.

issues.issue: Description is too vague. It omits that the component is a controlled TextInput wrapper (requires value and onUpdate), the debounce behavior, and that hasClear triggers an immediate (non-delayed) clear.
issues.suggestion: Controlled TextInput wrapper that delays calling onUpdate until the user stops typing. Requires both value and onUpdate props. When hasClear is used, clearing the input fires onUpdate immediately without delay.

issues.issue: Description omits the optional HelpPopover slot, the required-field star indicator, and support for row vs column layout directions.
issues.suggestion: Layout wrapper that pairs a label with a form field. Supports an optional HelpPopover slot alongside the label, a required-field star indicator, and both row and column layout directions.

issues.issue: Description omits swipe/mobile gesture navigation, full-screen support, and the footer thumbnail strip. It only describes keyboard and click navigation.
issues.suggestion: Modal gallery with keyboard, click, swipe, and mobile gesture navigation. Supports full-screen mode, a header with action slots, and a footer thumbnail strip. Children must be GalleryItem elements.

issues.issue: Description omits that onActivate must return a promise and that the loader remains visible until that promise resolves. It also does not mention the intersection sentinel mechanism.
issues.suggestion: Renders children followed by an intersection sentinel. When the sentinel enters the viewport and disabled is false, calls onActivate and shows a loader until the returned promise resolves. Pass disabled={true} when all data has been loaded.

issues.issue: Description is too vague and does not convey the dual-list UI, sortable selected list, select-all/deselect-all actions, custom item rendering, or filtering capability.
issues.suggestion: Dual-list selector with a left panel of available items and a right panel of selected items in user-defined order. Supports select-all, deselect-all, sortable selection, custom item rendering, and filtering.

issues.issue: Description only mentions multi-device support and omits title, action slots, custom header rendering, loading/error/empty states, infinite scroll for pagination, and swipe-to-dismiss via swipeThreshold.
issues.suggestion: Notifications panel with a title, action slots, and optional custom header. Supports loading, error, and empty states, infinite scroll for loading more items, and swipe-to-dismiss controlled by swipeThreshold.
